variants: Tigran Avedisyan specializes in Climate Policy, making significant contributions to the field through his innovative thinking. He is the author of the work titled Moonfern Storage Panel, which has garnered attention for its approach to sustainable technology. Tigran’s research benefitted from the support of the Yellowfin Source Grant, providing him the financial backing needed for his pioneering projects. His academic journey was influenced by his mentor, Janelle Thibault, whose guidance was instrumental in shaping his expertise. Additionally, Tigran enjoys being an active member of the Coralwing Aviators Society, where he shares his passion for aviation.
